meaning: n.胸部,乳房,胸怀,心情vt.以胸对着,对付
examples: Her mother died of breast cancer.
She developed a malignant breast tumour.
There are many advantages to breast feeding.
The parliament approved the resolution calling for stricter checks on breast implants the following day.
Pappas was relieved to be seen quickly, and by a renowned breast cancer specialist.
